ecarx.carext.userprofile

Interface IUserProfile

  • All Superinterfaces:
    BaseAPI
    Deprecated.

    @Deprecated
public interface IUserProfile
extends BaseAPI
         author  : KING.SUN
     e-mail  : xiaogangsun@ecarx.com.cn
     date    : 18-12-25
     desc    : The Profile ID must between 1 & the count(included)
     version : 1.0

    • Method Detail

      • getSupportUserProfileCount

        int getSupportUserProfileCount()
        Deprecated. 
        Get the count of the Profile which the hardware is Supported
        The Profile ID must between 1 & the count(included)

      • getUserProfileCreated

        int[] getUserProfileCreated()
        Deprecated. 
        Get the ID of all profiles that have been created

      • getCurrentId

        int getCurrentId()
        Deprecated. 
        get current user profile id
        Returns:
        user profile id

      • getProfileId

        int getProfileId(java.lang.String uid)
        Deprecated. 
        get the user profile id bind to User id(EID, GID...)
        Parameters:
        uid - User Identification

      • getUserId

        java.lang.String getUserId(int profileId)
        Deprecated. 
        get the User id(EID, GID...) bind to special profile id
        Parameters:
        profileId - Profile id

      • getProfileLoginType

        int getProfileLoginType(int profileId)
        Deprecated. 
        Get the type IUserProfile.ProfileLoginType that how the profile login
        Parameters:
        profileId - Profile id

      • addUserProfile

        int addUserProfile()
        Deprecated. 
        add new user profile with the default data
        Returns:
        The profile id has created, if <= 0, the caller should listen the callback

      • addUserProfileCopyFrom

        int addUserProfileCopyFrom(int profileId)
        Deprecated. 
        add new user profile & copy profile data IProfile from a given profile
        Parameters:
        profileId - The profile which copied from
        Returns:
        The profile id has created, if <= 0, the caller should listen the callback

      • removeUserProfile

        boolean removeUserProfile(int profileId)
        Deprecated. 
        remove user profile
        Parameters:
        profileId - The User profile id to remove
        Returns:
        true indicates the function is succeed

      • loginUserProfile

        boolean loginUserProfile(int profileId)
        Deprecated. 
        login a user profile
        Parameters:
        profileId - The User profile id to login
        Returns:
        true indicates the function is succeed

      • logoutUserProfile

        boolean logoutUserProfile(int profileId)
        Deprecated. 
        logout a user profile
        Parameters:
        profileId - The User profile id to logout
        Returns:
        true indicates the function is succeed

      • switchUserProfile

        boolean switchUserProfile(int oldProfileId,
                          int newProfileId)
        Deprecated. 
        switch a user profile
        Parameters:
        oldProfileId - The User profile id to logout
        newProfileId - The User profile id to login
        Returns:
        true indicates the function is succeed

      • getUserProfileData

        boolean getUserProfileData(int profileId)
        Deprecated. 
        Request get profile data stored for a profile id, IUserProfile.IUserProfileObserver.onUserProfileActionGet(java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        profileId - User profile id
        Returns:
        true-success false-fail

      • getUserProfileDataSync

        default IProfile getUserProfileDataSync(int profileId)
        Deprecated. 
        Sync get profile data stored for a profile id
        Parameters:
        profileId - User profile id
        Returns:
        profile data

      • applyUserProfileData

        boolean applyUserProfileData(int profileId,
                             IProfile profile)
        Deprecated. 
        apply user profile data for a profile id
        Parameters:
        profileId - User profile id
        profile - user profile data IProfile to be set
        Returns:
        true indicates the function is succeed

      • resetUserProfileDataDefault

        boolean resetUserProfileDataDefault(int profileId)
        Deprecated. 
        reset user profile data to default for a profile id
        Parameters:
        profileId - User profile id
        Returns:
        true indicates the function is succeed

      • notifyUIDInfoToProfile

        boolean notifyUIDInfoToProfile(int notifyAction,
                               java.lang.String uid,
                               @Nullable
                               android.os.Bundle uidExtras)
        Deprecated. 
        Notify User action & information to profile(vehicle HAL)
        Parameters:
        notifyAction - Notify action type IUserProfile.ActionType, maybe use login/logout or bind to profile
        uid - User Identification
        uidExtras - User extras, can be null
        Returns:
        true indicates the function is succeed

      • registerUserProfileObserver

        boolean registerUserProfileObserver(IUserProfile.IUserProfileObserver observer)
        Deprecated. 
        register user profile observer
        Parameters:
        observer - user profile observer IUserProfile.IUserProfileObserver try to register
        Returns:
        true indicates that register observer is succeeded

      • unregisterUserProfileObserver

        boolean unregisterUserProfileObserver(IUserProfile.IUserProfileObserver observer)
        Deprecated. 
        remove user profile observer
        Parameters:
        observer - user profile observer IUserProfile.IUserProfileObserver to be removed
        Returns:
        true indicates that remove observer is succeeded

      • saveToPreference

        boolean saveToPreference(int mid,
                         int functionId)
        Deprecated. 
        保存人体工学设置到对应用车偏好
        Parameters:
        functionId - 传入功能ID
        mid - 目前一个Profile对应3个槽位，mid固定为1/2/3其中一个，分别对应M1/M2/M3
        Returns:
        false：请求发送失败；true：请求发送成功

      • restorePreference

        boolean restorePreference(int mid,
                          int functionId)
        Deprecated. 
        恢复人体工学设置到调节前的状态
        Returns:
        false：请求发送失败；true：请求发送成功

      • saveToPreference

        boolean saveToPreference(int functionId)
        Deprecated. 
        保存人体工学设置到对应用车偏好
        Parameters:
        functionId - 传入功能ID
        Returns:
        false：请求发送失败；true：请求发送成功

      • restorePreference

        boolean restorePreference(int functionId)
        Deprecated. 
        恢复某mid人体工学设置到调节前的状态
        Parameters:
        functionId - 传入功能ID
        Returns:
        false：请求发送失败；true：请求发送成功

      • isEnrolledFaceData

        boolean isEnrolledFaceData(java.lang.String userid)
        Deprecated. 
        判断当前用户是否有人脸数据
        Parameters:
        userid - 传入用户ID
        Returns:
        false：当前用户没有人脸数据；true：当前用户有人脸数据

      • getPreferenceId

        int getPreferenceId(int type)
        Deprecated. 
        获取用车偏好ID
        Parameters:
        type - -->0：常用（默认）偏好； 1--> 正在使用的偏好
        Returns:
        固定为1/2/3其中一个，分别对应M1/M2/M3

      • saveCurrentUserProfile

        boolean saveCurrentUserProfile()
        Deprecated. 
        保存人体工学设置到当前激活的用车偏好中
        Returns:
        true 信号发送是否成功

      • restoreLastUserProfile

        boolean restoreLastUserProfile()
        Deprecated. 
        恢复上次在用车偏好中保存的人体工学设置
        Returns:
        true 信号发送是否成功

      • registerPreferenceObserver

        boolean registerPreferenceObserver(IUserProfile.IPreferenceObserver pb)
        Deprecated. 
        注册用车偏好回调监听
        Parameters:
        pb - IPreferenceObserver 回调接口对象
        Returns:
        false：请求发送失败；true：请求发送成功

      • unregisterPreferenceObserver

        boolean unregisterPreferenceObserver(IUserProfile.IPreferenceObserver pb)
        Deprecated. 
        反注册用车偏好回调监听
        Parameters:
        pb - IPreferenceObserver 回调接口对象
        Returns:
        false：请求发送失败；true：请求发送成功
